name: Data Encoding in C2 Communications
description: Detects base64 or hex encoding being used to obfuscate C2 traffic
query:
// Detect encoded data being sent over network
// Trigger on processes encoding data then making network calls
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(base64|xxd|certutil.*-encode|\[Convert\]::ToBase64|openssl.*enc)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 3
within 300 seconds
